label.readonly: fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or readonly_mass

field.name: container_id
field.readonly: fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or readonly_mass

field.name: bl_import_export_id
field.readonly: fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or has_confirmed_type or validate_correction_request

button.name: generate_sequence_bl_export
button.invisible: not has_bl_export or fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or validate_correction_request

field.name: bl_import_export_id2
field.readonly: fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or has_confirmed_type or validate_correction_request

button.name: generate_sequence_bl_import
button.invisible: not has_bl_import or fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or validate_correction_request

button.name: action_fill_everything
button.string: To Remove all the Product at hand

field.name: ek_table_regimen_60_ids
field.readonly: fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or readonly_mass

div.class: d-flex w-100 pb-2 gap-2 pb-0 col-6

button.name: action_clear_packages_goods
button.invisible: not ek_produc_packages_goods_ids or fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or readonly_mass

button.name: action_open_ai_goods_update_wizard
button.title: Actualizar Paquetes y Mercancía con IA
button.invisible: fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or readonly_mass

field.name: ek_produc_packages_goods_ids
field.readonly: fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or readonly_mass

field.name: invoice_ship_map_ids
field.readonly: fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or readonly_mass

form.div: This request has a practical mode ship, verify and validate the TRB Y TRN before CONFIRMING the request

field.name: container_id
field.readonly: fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or has_confirmed_type

group.string: Calculation data in days or hours

page.string: Data Required for National and International cargo

button.name: action_fill_everything
button.string: To Remove all the Product at hand

field.name: ek_produc_packages_goods_ids
field.readonly: fold or confirm_stage or canceled_stage or readonly_mass

group.name: packages_goods_totals
group.invisible: not regime in ['21','70','61'] or not ek_produc_packages_goods_ids

field.name: description_name
field.placeholder: This description is to provide details of the request
